name: python3-aardwolf
title: python3-aardwolf
description:
Asynchronous RDP/VNC client (Python 3)
This package contains an Asynchronous RDP/VNC client. The features are:
* Supports credssp auth via NTLM/Kerberos.
* Built-in proxy client allows SOCKS/HTTP proxy tunneling without 3rd part
software
* PtH via CredSSP+Restricted admin mode
* Scriptable Keyboard, Mouse input and Clipboard input/output
* Can run in headless mode, no GUI required (read: no need for Qt)
* Support for Duckyscript files to emulate keystrokes
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-aardwolf because Asynchronous RDP/VNC client (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-aardwolf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-aardwolf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-aardwolf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
